zh.lifeSummary: 當Roisia Lucy於1442年出生在英國瓦維其可爾哈爾可特時，她的父親William Lucy39歲，母親Eleanor Grey28歲。她和Sir Thomas John Poultney至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1515年11月1日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roisia Lucy于1442年出生在英国瓦維其可爾哈爾可特时，她的父亲William Lucy39岁，母亲Eleanor Grey28岁。她和Sir Thomas John Poultney至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1515年11月1日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Roisia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roisia Lucy was born in 1442, in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, her father, William Lucy, was 39 and her mother, Eleanor Grey, was 28. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Sir Thomas John Poultney. She died on 1 November 1515, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roisia Lucy est née en 1442, à Charlecote, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William Lucy, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Grey, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Sir Thomas John Poultney. Elle est décédée le 1 novembre 1515, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roisia Lucy 1442 in Charlecote, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Lucy 39 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Grey 28. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas John Poultney mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. November 1515 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roisia Lucy è nata il nel 1442 nel Charlecote, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William Lucy, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Grey, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Sir Thomas John Poultney. Morì il 1 novembre 1515, nel Misterton, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roisia Lucyが1442年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアチャーレコトで生まれた時，父William Lucyは39歳，母Eleanor Greyは28歳であった。彼女はSir Thomas John Poultneyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1515年11月1日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミステルトンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roisia Lucy(이)가 1442년 영국 워윅실르 찰렉트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Lucy(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Grey(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas John Poultney(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 11월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roisia Lucy nasceu em 1442, em Charlecote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Lucy, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Grey, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Sir Thomas John Poultney. Ela faleceu em 1 de novembro de 1515, em Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roisia Lucy родилась в 1442 г. в местности чарлекот, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Lucy было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Grey, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Sir Thomas John Poultney. Она умерла 1 ноября 1515 г. в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roisia Lucy nació en 1442, en Charlecote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Lucy, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Eleanor Grey, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Sir Thomas John Poultney. Murió el 1 de noviembre de 1515, en Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 73 años.
